effects.head: BREAK_BLOCK
effects.doc: Break the target block(s) (default @Here; drops=false clears). @Vein/@Tunnel/@Trench for shapes.

effects.head: CANCEL
effects.doc: Cancel the Bukkit event that triggered this activation.

effects.head: CURE
effects.doc: Clear active potion effects of one category from the target(s): ALL (default), HARMFUL, BENEFICIAL, or NEUTRAL. category HARMFUL strips only debuffs (positive effects untouched).

effects.head: DAMAGE
effects.doc: Deal a flat amount of extra damage to the target.

effects.head: DAMAGE_MOD
effects.doc: Contribute to the damage fold: side attack/defense, mode add (percent) or flat (raw amount). A NEGATIVE amount is a self-nerf — attack:add:-50 halves your own outgoing damage. Replaces ADD_DAMAGE/REDUCE_DAMAGE/FLAT_DAMAGE/FLAT_REDUCE.
effects.example: { DAMAGE_MOD: { side: attack, mode: add, amount: 25 } }

effects.head: DAMAGE_SCALE
effects.doc: Contribute per resolved target in 'who' to the damage fold: total = per * count, clamped to cap (0 = uncapped). side attack/defense, mode add (percent, e.g. 10 = +10% each) or flat (raw). The count is the selector's resolved set, e.g. who: @AllPlayers{r=7}.
effects.example: { DAMAGE_SCALE: { side: attack, mode: add, per: 10, cap: 100, who: "@AllPlayers{r=7}" } }

effects.head: DISARM
effects.doc: Make the target(s) drop their held (main-hand) item.

effects.head: DROP_ITEM
effects.doc: Drop a material as an item at the activation location. No-op if there is no location.

effects.head: DURABILITY
effects.doc: Modify durability of the player's held item and/or worn armor: restore (amount<0 = full) or damage. Replaces ADD_DURABILITY/ADD_DURABILITY_ITEM/REPAIR/DAMAGE_ARMOR.

params.name: amount
params.label: int
params.doc: durability points; negative fully restores (restore mode)

effects.head: EQUIP_SWAP
effects.doc: Temporarily replace the target's `slot` armour piece with `material`, restoring it after `duration` ticks (death-safe: the real piece drops / is kept). Default target the victim.
effects.example: { EQUIP_SWAP: { slot: helmet, material: CARVED_PUMPKIN, duration: 60, who: "@Victim" } }

effects.head: EXPLODE
effects.doc: Create an explosion at the target.

effects.head: EXP_MULTIPLY
effects.doc: Multiply the XP gained (EXP_GAIN trigger) by a factor.

effects.head: EXTINGUISH
effects.doc: Put out the target's fire.

effects.head: FALLING_BLOCK
effects.doc: Spawn a (2*radius+1)² grid of falling blocks `height` blocks above each target (removed after `ttl` if they never land). A landing block fires the actor's IMPACT abilities on what it hit; `carry` is forwarded to that impact as %damage% (set carry: "%damage%").
effects.usage: { FALLING_BLOCK: { material: <material>, radius: <int[0..4]=1>, height: <int[0..12]=4>, ttl: <ticks[0..]=40>, carry: <double=0> } }
effects.example: { FALLING_BLOCK: { material: GRASS_BLOCK, radius: 1, height: 4, carry: "%damage%", who: "@Victim" } }

effects.head: FILL_OXYGEN
effects.doc: Refill the target's air supply.

effects.head: FIREWORK
effects.doc: Spawn a cosmetic firework at the activation location. No-op if there is no location.

effects.head: FLY
effects.doc: Grant the player temporary flight.

effects.head: FLY_MODE
effects.doc: Grant flight to the target(s) while NOT in combat, revoke it while in combat (survival/adventure only). Author on trigger [REPEATING, PASSIVE] with a repeat period so it re-checks and tears down on unequip.

effects.head: GIVE_ITEM
effects.doc: Give a material to the player target(s); overflow drops at their feet.

effects.head: GUARD
effects.doc: Summon count guardian mobs of type at the activation location, each targeting the attacker, auto-removed after ttl ticks (default 200; 0 = permanent); optional custom name. A targeted SPAWN_ENTITY for retaliation — author on DEFENSE.
effects.example: { GUARD: { type: IRON_GOLEM, count: 1, ttl: 200, name: "&bGuardian" } }

effects.head: HEALTH
effects.doc: Add to the target's maximum health (restored on unequip).

effects.head: IGNITE
effects.doc: Set the target(s) on fire for a duration in ticks.

effects.head: IGNORE_ARMOR
effects.doc: Make the triggering hit ignore the victim's armor and enchant-protection reduction.

effects.head: IMMUNE
effects.doc: Make the target player(s) immune to a damage cause (sword/axe/projectile/potion/all) for duration ticks.

effects.head: INVERT_VAR
effects.doc: Numerically invert a per-player variable (0↔1), preserving its remaining TTL.

effects.head: INVINCIBLE
effects.doc: Make the target invulnerable for a span of ticks, then restore.

effects.head: KEEP_ON_DEATH
effects.doc: Keep the target's items + levels (no drops) if they die within duration ticks (default 200). Author on trigger REPEATING for an always-on death-keep while worn, or fire on a trigger for a timed grace window. A kept death never spends a holy scroll.

effects.head: KILL
effects.doc: Instantly kill the target.

effects.head: KNOCKBACK_CONTROL
effects.doc: Scale the target's incoming knockback for duration ticks: 0 cancels it, 0.5 halves it, 2 doubles it (default: cancel for 2 ticks). Use on DEFENSE for your own knockback, or on ATTACK with who: victim for the knockback you deal.

effects.head: LIGHTNING
effects.doc: Strike the target(s) with lightning, optionally dealing extra damage (0 = cosmetic).

effects.head: MARK
effects.doc: Mark the target(s) so the actor deals an extra `amount`% damage to them for `duration` ticks. Applied by the damage fold on the actor's later hits; default target the combat victim.

effects.head: MARK_ZONE
effects.doc: Lay an actor-owned cylinder of `radius` blocks under each target for `duration` ticks. Read by the %victim.inzone% fact, so a condition-gated bonus can deal more to an enemy inside it.

effects.head: MAX_HEALTH_DRAIN
effects.doc: Temporarily remove `fraction` of the target's overhealth (max health above `baseline`) plus a flat `amount`, restoring it after `duration` ticks. Default target the combat victim.

effects.head: MESSAGE
effects.doc: Send feedback on a channel: chat (default), actionbar, or title (with subtitle + fade/stay/fade timings). Default recipient self; `who` can name any party (e.g. @Victim). The `{ATTACKER}`/`{VICTIM}` tokens expand to the activating player and the other combat party. Replaces ACTIONBAR/TITLE.
effects.usage: { MESSAGE: { text: <string>, channel: <enum{chat|actionbar|title}=chat>, subtitle: <string=>, fadeIn: <ticks[0..]=10>, stay: <ticks[0..]=70>, fadeOut: <ticks[0..]=20> } }

effects.head: MODIFY_EXP
effects.doc: Modify a player target's experience: give to them, take from them, or transfer (take from the target and grant the total to the activator). Replaces GIVE_EXP.

effects.head: MODIFY_FOOD
effects.doc: Modify a player target's hunger: give food points (clamped to 20) or take them (clamped to 0). Replaces FEED.

effects.head: MODIFY_HEALTH
effects.doc: Modify a target's health: give heals them, take deals direct health damage, transfer (lifesteal) damages the target and heals the activator by the same amount, set forces their health to the amount. Replaces HEAL.

effects.head: MODIFY_MONEY
effects.doc: Modify a player target's balance: give to them, take from them, transfer (take from the target and give the total to the activator), or steal_percent (give the activator that PERCENT of the target's balance — amount is a 0..100 percentage). Replaces GIVE_MONEY/TAKE_MONEY/STEAL_MONEY[_PERCENT].

effects.head: MOVEMENT_SPEED
effects.doc: Set the player target's walk speed for a span of ticks, then restore the default (0.2).

effects.head: PARTICLE
effects.doc: Spawn particles at the activation location. No-op if there is no location.

effects.head: PARTICLE_LINE
effects.doc: Draw a coloured-dust line from each 'who' target's hip to the actor's hip, `density` motes per block, tinted r/g/b (0-255). Pair with who: @AllPlayers{r=N} for a fan of tethers.
effects.usage: { PARTICLE_LINE: { particle: <particle>, r: <int[0..255]=255>, g: <int[0..255]=255>, b: <int[0..255]=255>, size: <double[0..]=1>, density: <double[0..]=2>, height: <double=1> } }
effects.example: { PARTICLE_LINE: { particle: REDSTONE, r: 255, g: 255, b: 255, density: 2, who: "@AllPlayers{r=7}" } }

effects.head: PARTICLE_RING
effects.doc: Draw a horizontal ring of `count` coloured-dust motes of radius `radius` at `height` above the target's feet (default @Self), tinted r/g/b (0-255). A radius / aura indicator.
effects.usage: { PARTICLE_RING: { particle: <particle>, r: <int[0..255]=255>, g: <int[0..255]=255>, b: <int[0..255]=255>, size: <double[0..]=1>, radius: <double[0..]=3>, count: <int[1..]=36>, height: <double=1> } }
effects.example: { PARTICLE_RING: { particle: REDSTONE, r: 255, g: 255, b: 255, radius: 7, count: 60 } }

effects.head: POTION
effects.doc: Apply a potion effect to the target(s) at the given LEVEL (1-based: level 1 = the I tier), for a duration in ticks. The effect name is resolved to a handle at compile time. On a HELD/PASSIVE source it is removed again when the item is unequipped (§B lifecycle).

effects.head: POTION_LOCK
effects.doc: Strip a potion effect from the target(s) and continuously deny it for `ticks` (a re-strip each tick), so it cannot be re-applied during the window. Default target self.

effects.head: PROJECTILE
effects.doc: Launch count projectiles of a type from the activator's eye (covers SPAWN_ARROWS via the ARROW type).

effects.head: REMOVE_ARMOR
effects.doc: Strip one random worn armour piece from the target(s) and drop it.

effects.head: REMOVE_ITEM
effects.doc: Remove up to count of a material from the player target(s)' inventory.

effects.head: REMOVE_POTION
effects.doc: Remove a potion effect from the target(s).

effects.head: REMOVE_SOULS
effects.doc: Debit souls from a soul gem: @Self (default) charges the activator's active gem, @Victim drains the target's own gem. A no-op when that player is not in soul mode.

effects.head: RUN_COMMAND
effects.doc: Run a command from the console. Affinity GLOBAL — runs on the global thread.

effects.head: SEEK
effects.doc: Make the projectile fired by this BOW_FIRE activation home onto the nearest target in sight.

effects.head: SET_BLOCK
effects.doc: Set the target block(s) to a material (default @Here = the activation block).

effects.head: SET_VAR
effects.doc: Set a per-player variable readable in later conditions as %name% (ttl ticks, 0 = forever).
effects.example: { SET_VAR: { name: rage, value: 1, ttl: 200, who: "@Self" } }

effects.head: SMELT
effects.doc: Auto-smelt the block broken by this MINE activation (ore→ingot, sand→glass, …).

effects.head: SOUND
effects.doc: Play a sound at the activation location. No-op if the activation has no location.

effects.head: SPAWN_ENTITY
effects.doc: Spawn count entities of type at the target's (or activation) location; ttl ticks until removal (0 = permanent), optional starting health, and owner=activator to tame an owned summon to the activator. Replaces SPAWN/TNT.
effects.usage: { SPAWN_ENTITY: { type: <entity_type>, count: <int[1..]=1>, ttl: <ticks[0..]=0>, health: <double[0..]=0>, owner: <enum{none|activator}=none> } }
effects.example: { SPAWN_ENTITY: { type: WOLF, count: 1, ttl: 0, health: 0, owner: activator } }

effects.head: SUPPRESS
effects.doc: Disable a target's enchant/group/type (the key) for a duration in ticks (DISABLE_ENCHANT/GROUP/TYPE). Default target the combat victim.
effects.example: { SUPPRESS: { scope: GROUP, key: lifesteal, duration: 200, who: "@Victim" } }

effects.head: SUPPRESS_IMMUNE
effects.doc: Make the target(s) immune to suppression (DISABLE_ENCHANT/GROUP/TYPE) while worn — a maintained PASSIVE flag, armed on equip and lifted on unequip. An optional chance (default 100) makes it a per-suppression roll instead of absolute. Player-only.

effects.head: TELEBLOCK
effects.doc: Block the target player(s) from teleporting (ender pearl / chorus fruit) for duration ticks.

effects.head: TELEPORT
effects.doc: Teleport the target to the actor's or the victim's location.

params.name: to
params.label: enum{VICTIM|ACTOR}
params.doc: destination party: the victim or the actor

effects.head: TELEPORT_BEHIND
effects.doc: Teleport the mover(s) `distance` blocks behind the reference (of: VICTIM — the attacker on a DEFENSE trigger — or ACTOR), facing as it faces. Unsafe (blocked / wall between) → onFail ONTOP lands on the reference, NONE cancels.
effects.example: { TELEPORT_BEHIND: { of: VICTIM, distance: 1, onFail: ONTOP, who: "@Self" } }

effects.head: TELEPORT_DROPS
effects.doc: Send the block's drops straight to the breaker's inventory (this MINE activation).

effects.head: TEMP_BLOCK
effects.doc: Place a temporary block shape that reverts after `ticks`: shape POINT / FOOTPRINT (radius) / COLUMN (height, ahead in the target's facing), at feet level + dy. airOnly only replaces air (safe placement); a non-airOnly FOOTPRINT replaces only the solid ground under the feet (never air, so a trail can't scaffold); other shapes replace anything and restore on revert.
effects.usage: { TEMP_BLOCK: { shape: <enum{POINT|FOOTPRINT|COLUMN}=POINT>, material: <material>, ticks: <ticks[0..]=60>, radius: <int[0..4]=0>, height: <int[1..8]=1>, ahead: <int[0..8]=0>, dy: <int[-4..4]=0>, airOnly: <bool=true> } }
effects.example: { TEMP_BLOCK: { shape: COLUMN, material: ICE, height: 2, ahead: 1, ticks: 60, who: "@Attacker" } }

effects.head: VELOCITY
effects.doc: Apply velocity to the target(s): mode=add uses x/y/z; mode=away knocks them back from the activator with strength. Replaces THROW/LAUNCH/KNOCKBACK.
effects.usage: { VELOCITY: { mode: <enum{add|away}=add>, x: <double=0>, y: <double=0>, z: <double=0>, strength: <double[0..]=0> } }
effects.example: { VELOCITY: { mode: add, x: 0, y: 1.2, z: 0 } }

effects.head: WALKER
effects.doc: Lay a temporary platform of a material under the target for a duration (then revert), out to a radius. replace = AIR_ONLY | REPLACEABLE (air/liquid) | ANY.

selectors.head: ADD
selectors.doc: The activation location offset by (x, y, z).

selectors.head: ALLPLAYERS
selectors.doc: Every player within r blocks of the target, except the activator.

selectors.head: AOE
selectors.doc: Living entities within r blocks of the target, except the activator; optionally filtered and capped.

selectors.head: ATTACKER
selectors.doc: The entity that damaged the activator (for defensive effects).

selectors.head: BLOCK
selectors.doc: The first solid block the activator is looking at, within distance.

selectors.head: BLOCKINDISTANCE
selectors.doc: The first solid block along the activator's line of sight, within distance.

selectors.head: ENTITYINSIGHT
selectors.doc: The living entity the activator is looking at within r blocks, or nothing.

selectors.head: EYEHEIGHT
selectors.doc: The activator's eye location (their position at eye level).

selectors.head: HERE
selectors.doc: The activation block location itself — the default target of block effects.

selectors.head: MARKED
selectors.doc: Every nearby living entity the activator currently has an active MARK on.

selectors.head: NEAREST
selectors.doc: The single nearest living entity within r blocks (optionally filtered), except the activator.

selectors.head: NEARESTPLAYER
selectors.doc: The single nearest player within r blocks, except the activator.

selectors.head: PLAYERFROMNAME
selectors.doc: The online player with the given exact name, or nothing if they are not online.

params.name: name
params.label: string
params.doc: the exact name of the online player to target

selectors.head: TRENCH
selectors.doc: The square of blocks perpendicular to the look direction, centred on the activation block.

selectors.head: TUNNEL
selectors.doc: The blocks directly ahead of the activation block, along the look direction.

params.name: depth
params.label: int[1..]
params.doc: blocks ahead along the look direction

selectors.head: VEIN
selectors.doc: Up to `limit` blocks contiguous with and matching the activation block (vein miner).

selectors.head: VICTIM
selectors.doc: The combat victim (the entity the activator hit).

flow.doc: proceed to the chance roll as normal
force activation, skipping the chance roll
allow activation regardless of the chance roll
add N percentage points to the chance roll
